Off Calendar Oct-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge John E. Munter, Clerk Nicole Adams, Reporter Patricia Dowling-Tuckett.

J. Scott McKay appeared on behalf of plaintiff Randolph Georgi. Defendant Peter Georgi appeared telephonically in pro per.

The court ruled that the "Statement of Disqualification" and "Supplemental Statement of Disqualification" as to Commissioner Hewlitt was striken for failure to personally serve Commissioner Hewlitt. The matter was referred forthwith to Dept. 612 for further hearing regarding lifting of the stay of the body attachment issued as to Peter Georgi.
